task_completion.description: Verifies that the agent has successfully logged in and accessed the Floreant POS Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Floreant POS Back Office window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies that the agent navigated to the Menu Items section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Menu Items' or 'Menu Item Explorer' window/tab is open, displaying a list of available menu items.

task_completion.description: Verifies that the agent opened the specific menu item for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit dialog or configuration window specifically for the menu item 'Grilled Ribeye Steak' is open.

task_completion.description: Verifies that the agent navigated to the modifiers configuration for the item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Modifiers' or 'Modifier Groups' tab/section is actively selected within the 'Grilled Ribeye Steak' edit window.

task_completion.description: Verifies that the target modifier group was successfully attached to the menu item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The modifier group 'Cooking Preference' is clearly visible in the list of assigned, added, or included modifier groups for the 'Grilled Ribeye Steak' menu item.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the Floreant POS graphical interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS Java GUI, without any terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Floreant POS system and is not a text editor, web browser, or mock application.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't use a database client to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No Derby SQL clients, command-line interfaces, or database management tools are visible modifying the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target menu item is 'Grilled Ribeye Steak' (Expected Price: $24.99). The target modifier group to attach is 'Cooking Preference'. The manager PIN to access the Back Office is 1111. The VLM should verify these exact names appear in the Floreant POS GUI during the linking process.
